description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a classic design, featuring a long, cylindrical black barrel and a wooden stock and fore-end. The receiver and barrel are finished in a matte black, while the stock and pump handle are made of polished wood with visible grain. A red shotgun shell is positioned below the receiver, indicating its ammunition type. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a standard trigger, with the pump mechanism clearly visible beneath the barrel. The overall build is robust, with a full-length stock for shoulder support and a tubular magazine running parallel beneath the main barrel.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a black barrel, wooden stock and fore-end, and a visible red shotgun shell beneath the receiver.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and pump, with the red shell visible to the side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, including the wooden stock, pump handle, and the red shell beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and pump, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the shotgun, similar to view 1 but from the other side, with the wooden stock and pump handle clearly visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
